items.title: Async/Await & Promises
items.description: Node's non-blocking I/O is Promise-based; most built-in async APIs return Promises you await.

items.title: Bundlers & Tooling
items.description: TypeScript and bundlers/runners (tsc, tsx, esbuild) turn TS into runnable Node code.

items.title: os & pathlib
items.description: Node's process.env / fs / path mirror Python's os and pathlib for the same OS-level tasks.
